name: repolens-skill
description: Lightweight code graph Skill for project memory, performance reports, and algorithm opportunity matching.

scripts.demo: npm run demo:index && npm run demo:context && npm run demo:report && npm run demo:algo && npm run test
scripts.demo:algo: node repolens-algo/scripts/build_block_profiles.mjs repolens-perf/tests/fixtures/phase-one "/activity/:id" && node repolens-algo/scripts/retrieve_algorithms.mjs repolens-perf/tests/fixtures/phase-one "/activity/:id" && node repolens-algo/scripts/generate_algo_report.mjs repolens-perf/tests/fixtures/phase-one "/activity/:id"
scripts.check: node --check repolens-perf/scripts/index_project.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/scripts/trace_module.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/scripts/build_context_pack.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/scripts/perf_report.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/scripts/build_block_profiles.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/scripts/retrieve_algorithms.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/scripts/generate_algo_report.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/tests/perfgraph.test.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/tests/algograph.test.mjs
